name: Website SEO analyzer
description: Performs an on-page SEO audit by scraping any website URL with Firecrawl, using Claude to analyze SEO factors (title tags, meta descriptions, headings, content quality, technical issues), and emailing the detailed audit report via Gmail.

source.originalName: Analyze any website with OpenAI and get on-page SEO audit

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending the audit report

url.description: Website URL to analyze for SEO (e.g. 'https://example.com')

recipientEmail.description: Email address to receive the SEO audit report

steps.name: Scrape the target website with Firecrawl
Build Claude prompt for SEO audit
Run Claude AI for SEO audit
Email SEO audit report via Gmail
